case_title: BANK OF THE WEST VS. KUNTZMAN TRUCKING, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEC-16-2008 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR DEC-16-2008 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
DECLARATION OF DOUGLAS HOLLOWAY IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT. FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST SERVED SEP-11-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KUNTZMAN TRUCKING, INC.
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, AS TO DEFENDANT WATERS, VIRGIL
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT ( EQUIPMENT VALUATION ) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST
DECLARATION OF COPIES MADE AS BUSINESS RECORD ( EVID CODE 1521, 1550 ) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST

CAUSE CALLED, THE COURT ORDERED THAT PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KUNTZMAN TRUCKING, INC. WATERS, VIRGIL POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH RE: LEASE EQUIPMENT FAIR MARKET VALUE $ 27,500.00, OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $24,904.12 DAMAGES, $2,500.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $660.00 COSTS, $688.82 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $28,752.94, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST AS TO DEFENDANT KUNTZMAN TRUCKING, INC. BOATWRIGHT, KENNETH WATERS, VIRGIL DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JAN-30-2009 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-28-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JAN-15-2009
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST SERVED SEP-11-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WATERS, VIRGIL
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $660.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT KUNTZMAN TRUCKING, INC. WATERS, VIRGIL
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AND 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION AS TO DEFENDANT BOATWRIGHT, KENNETH DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JAN-30-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
